permissionMode.name: Who may spectate
permissionMode.hint: Controls which tokens a player is allowed to spectate. The GM can always spectate anything. NPC tokens are governed separately by 'Allow spectating NPC tokens'.

allowNpcSpectate.name: Allow spectating NPC tokens
allowNpcSpectate.hint: When on, players may also spectate NPC (non-player-owned) tokens, subject to the mode above and any per-token overrides. Off by default so players only see each other's perspectives. Individual NPCs can still be enabled or disabled from the spectator picker.

cameraMode.name: Camera follow mode
cameraMode.hint: How the camera tracks a moving token.

followSpeed.name: Follow speed
followSpeed.hint: Responsiveness of smooth/interpolate camera follow (higher is snappier).

deadZone.name: Dead-zone size
deadZone.hint: Fraction of the screen the token may drift before a dead-zone camera reacts.

zoomMemory.name: Keep my zoom level
zoomMemory.hint: Hold the zoom you were already at when spectating starts, instead of re-framing.

crossSceneBehaviour.name: When a tracked token changes scene
crossSceneBehaviour.hint: What to do when the token you are following moves to another scene.

debugLogging.name: Debug logging
debugLogging.hint: Verbose console output prefixed with 'Dynamic Spectator'.

notify.notAllowed: You are not allowed to spectate {name}.
notify.noPlayerToken: That player has no token on this scene.
notify.gmOnly: Only the GM can do that.

picker.title: Spectate a Token
picker.empty: No tokens you can spectate on this scene.
picker.toggleNpc: Toggle whether players may spectate this NPC

crossScene.title: Tracked token changed scene
crossScene.body: A token you are following has moved to another scene. Follow it there?

quickSpectate.name: Quick spectate (hovered token)
quickSpectate.hint: Spectate the hovered / selected / targeted token, or open the picker.

openPicker.name: Open spectator picker
openPicker.hint: Open the searchable list of spectatable tokens.

stopSpectate.name: Stop spectating
stopSpectate.hint: Release the camera and restore your normal vision. Bound to Escape, which only takes over while you are actually spectating.

openDashboard.name: Open GM dashboard
openDashboard.hint: Open the GM control centre (GM only).
